site.description: Plan shared trips with calendars, plans and real-time collaboration.
footer.createdWith: Built for organizing getaways, routes and bookings from one shared space.
home.title: Plan trips with accommodation, maps, calendars and shared plans.
home.description: TravelPlan helps you prepare getaways and group trips from one web app: create trips, save plans with locations, check maps, organize dates and share the itinerary with other people.
home.feature.sharedTrips: Create a trip with dates, destination, status and accommodation.
home.feature.flexiblePlans: Add visits, meals, transport or ideas with map and status.
home.feature.collaboration: Share the trip with invited people and clear permissions.
home.feature.calendars: View dated plans, pending items and the global calendar.
home.highlight.organizedTitle: The whole trip in one view
home.highlight.organizedDescription: Centralize accommodation, plans, statuses, locations and dates so you do not depend on scattered notes, chats or separate maps.
home.highlight.collaborativeDescription: Invite other people to view or edit the itinerary, review plans and keep the trip up to date from the same place.
home.highlight.readyTitle: Maps and calendar from day one
home.highlight.readyDescription: Every plan can include a location, date and status so you can review the trip as a list, calendar or map without losing context.
auth.title: Sign in with Google
auth.description: Sign in with your Google account to save trips, accept invitations and recover your itinerary on any device.
auth.helper: Press the button to open the Google account chooser and enter your travel dashboard.
auth.passwordHint: Your password must contain at least 6 characters.
auth.signInDescription: Connect with Google and go straight to your shared trips dashboard.
auth.registerDescription: Start your collaborative dashboard and accept invites for future trips.
auth.success: Signed in. Redirecting to the dashboard.
auth.created: Account created. Redirecting to the dashboard.
auth.providerHint: The Google provider must be enabled in Firebase Authentication.
firebase.configPending: Firebase public environment variables are still missing, so auth and Firestore are not active yet.
firebase.configReady: Firebase is configured and the app can connect.
firebase.permissionDenied: Firestore rejected the read. Review and publish your Firebase project rules.
dashboard.metaDescription: Review your trips, create new itineraries and manage shared invitations.
dashboard.title: Welcome to TravelPlan
dashboard.description: Create new getaways, review statuses and accept invitations from a central view with quick access to every trip and calendar.
dashboard.createHint: Trips created here appear in your dashboard and in the global calendar.
dashboard.createError: The trip could not be created.
dashboard.empty: You do not have any trips yet. Create the first one to start shaping your itinerary.
dashboard.invitesEmpty: You do not have any pending invitations right now.
trip.metaDescription: Edit a trip, invite collaborators and add detailed plans.
trip.title: Manage the trip and its plans
trip.description: Update general details, coordinate members and build a categorized plan list so the whole group keeps the same context.
trip.form.name: Trip name
trip.form.helper: Changes are saved in Firestore and visible to invited collaborators.
trip.form.error: The trip could not be saved.
trip.membersEmpty: There are no extra invited people in this trip yet.
trip.invite.helper: You can invite someone even if they have not signed up yet. They will see the invite when they use that email.
trip.invite.error: The invitation could not be sent.
trip.plansHelper: Create a quick plan now and refine it in the detail page later.
trip.plansEmpty: This trip does not have any plans yet.
trip.plansError: The plan could not be created.
trip.missingId: The trip identifier is missing from the URL.
trip.notFound: The requested trip could not be found.
tripAi.metaDescription: Generate candidate plans with AI from the trip context and review each proposal before saving it.
tripAi.title: Generate candidate plans for this trip
tripAi.description: Define area, radius, transport, dates and desired types. AI will return validated JSON suggestions that you can save one by one.
tripAi.form.title: Search parameters
tripAi.form.baseLocationQuestion: Which town or base area should the search start from?
tripAi.form.baseLocationHint: Use a neighborhood, city or zone that makes sense as the search anchor during the trip.
tripAi.form.baseLocationMapHint: You can type a search, choose an OpenStreetMap result or pin the point directly on the map.
tripAi.form.baseLocationPlaceholder: E.g. old town, central station or accommodation
tripAi.form.radiusQuestion: How far should the search be allowed to go?
tripAi.form.radiusHint: Pick a realistic distance from the base area so the suggestions stay coherent.
tripAi.form.transportQuestion: How will you mostly move around during that part of the trip?
tripAi.form.transportHint: The transport mode helps AI avoid unrealistic or unnecessarily distant plans.
tripAi.form.budgetQuestion: Do you want free plans, paid plans or both?
tripAi.form.budgetHint: This helps filter the suggestions so they better match what you want.
tripAi.form.typesQuestion: Which kinds of plans are you most interested in right now?
tripAi.form.typesHint: You can select multiple categories so the final selection is more useful and varied.
tripAi.form.datesQuestion: Which exact trip dates should the recommendations focus on?
tripAi.form.datesHint: Keep the search inside the actual trip range so the ideas are better aligned.
tripAi.form.helper: Suggestions consider the trip dates and the already saved plans to avoid obvious duplicates.
tripAi.form.running: AI is preparing a validated selection of candidate plans.
tripAi.form.success: Review the suggestions before adding them to the trip.
tripAi.results.title: Suggested candidates
tripAi.results.idle: Complete the wizard to request a set of candidate plans tailored to this trip.
tripAi.results.empty: AI did not return any valid candidates after applying the trip checks and filters.
tripAi.results.savedSuccess: The suggestion was converted into a normal trip plan.
tripAi.results.saveError: This suggestion could not be saved as a plan.
tripAi.results.emptyAfterDiscard: There are no suggestions left to review.
tripAi.results.doneAll: There are no more pending suggestions. You can go back to the trip or generate another batch.
tripAi.results.noMore: No more distinct suggestions were found with the current filters.
tripAi.typeHint.visit: Places, viewpoints, walks or interesting spots to visit.
tripAi.typeHint.food: Lunches, dinners, breakfasts or worthwhile food stops.
tripAi.typeHint.stay: Stays or rest stops if they make sense for the trip.
tripAi.typeHint.transport: Transfers, useful connections or movements between areas.
tripAi.typeHint.museum: Museums, cultural centers or structured visits.
tripAi.typeHint.shop: Markets, shops or shopping stops that fit the itinerary.
tripAi.typeHint.bathroom: Functional stops or services useful during a concrete route.
tripAi.typeHint.other: Ideas that do not fit neatly into another supported category.
tripAi.error.invalidBaseLocation: Enter a valid town or base area for the search.
tripAi.error.invalidRadius: The radius must be between 1 and 300 km.
tripAi.error.invalidTypes: Select at least one plan type.
tripAi.error.invalidDates: Enter valid dates to narrow down the search.
tripAi.error.invalidDateOrder: The start date cannot be later than the end date.
tripAi.error.outsideTripRange: The wizard dates must stay inside the actual trip range.
tripAi.error.projectId: The AI API rejected the request because of `project_id`. Review the Firebase project configuration.
tripAi.error.authRejected: The AI API did not accept the current authenticated user. Try signing in again.
tripAi.error.network: The AI request could not leave the browser. It may be a network or CORS problem.
tripAi.error.timeout: AI took too long to respond. Try again in a few seconds.
tripAi.error.invalidResponse: The AI response did not pass strict validation for the expected JSON.
tripAi.error.missingConfig: Firebase public config is missing or there is no authenticated user available for AI calls.
tripAi.error.quota: The temporary AI usage limit for this session or day has been reached.
tripAi.error.generic: Suggestions could not be generated right now.
tripCreate.metaDescription: Create a new trip in a dedicated page.
tripCreate.title: Create a trip step by step
tripCreate.description: Define the trip in a page focused only on creation, without mixing other dashboard tasks.
tripEdit.metaDescription: Update the main trip information in a dedicated view.
tripEdit.title: Update trip details
tripEdit.description: Edit name, place, dates and status in a page focused only on that task.
tripMembers.metaDescription: Invite people and review collaboration permissions in a separate view.
tripMembers.title: Invitations and permissions
tripMembers.description: Manage who can view or edit the trip from an independent screen.
invites.metaDescription: Review and accept trip invitations in their own page.
invites.title: Your pending invitations
invites.description: Accept invitations without mixing this task with the main trip listing.
plan.metaDescription: Edit name, description, category, date, time and status for one plan.
plan.title: Fine tune every trip plan
plan.description: Update the content of a plan from a clean detail view built for collaboration.
plan.deleteHelper: You can edit this task or delete it permanently.
plan.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task? This action cannot be undone.
plan.deleteError: The task could not be deleted.
plan.form.name: Plan name
plan.form.helper: If date or time are empty, the plan remains visible as still unscheduled.
plan.form.error: The plan could not be saved.
plan.missingId: Trip or plan identifiers are missing from the URL.
plan.descriptionEmpty: Add a description to give this plan more context.
planCreate.metaDescription: Create a new plan in a dedicated page.
planCreate.title: Add a plan to the trip
planCreate.description: Fill category, date, location and status in a view focused only on creating plans.
planEdit.metaDescription: Update a plan in a specific editing page.
planEdit.title: Update the plan
planEdit.description: Edit every plan detail in a separate page from the read-only detail view.
plan.location.placeholder: Search for an address, neighborhood or point of interest
plan.location.helper: Search a place, pick it from the results or click directly on the map.
plan.location.initialState: Results will appear here when you search for a location.
plan.location.noneSelected: No location has been assigned to this plan yet.
plan.location.noResults: No results were found for that search.
plan.location.searchError: OpenStreetMap could not be queried right now.
plan.location.emptyQuery: Write a search before querying OpenStreetMap.
accommodation.metaDescription: Review and edit the accommodation linked to a trip.
accommodation.title: Manage the trip accommodation
accommodation.description: Save the accommodation name, location and quick map access from a dedicated view.
accommodation.emptyDescription: No accommodation has been saved for this trip yet.
accommodation.form.name: Accommodation name
accommodation.form.optionalHint: If you do not need accommodation, you can leave this block empty.
accommodation.form.helper: Save the accommodation to open it quickly in Google Maps and calculate distances for plans.
accommodation.form.error: The accommodation could not be saved.
calendar.tripMetaDescription: Review trip plans grouped by actual dates and keep unscheduled plans visible as well.
calendar.tripDescription: Show only the days that already have plans and keep unscheduled plans separate so the itinerary stays focused.
calendar.globalMetaDescription: Visualize plans from all your trips in one monthly view.
calendar.globalDescription: Combine plans from every trip to detect overlaps, busy weeks and your next getaways.
map.metaDescription: Review trip plan locations on a map.
map.title: Plans placed on the map
map.description: Visualize trip points with Leaflet and OpenStreetMap to spot clusters, distances and still-empty areas.
map.empty: This trip does not have any plans with an assigned location yet.
calendar.empty: There are no dated plans in this trip.
calendar.noUnscheduled: There are no unscheduled plans in this trip.
tripChecklist.metaDescription: Prepare and complete the checklist attached to each trip from a dedicated page.
tripChecklist.title: Trip checklist
tripChecklist.form.title: New task
tripChecklist.form.placeholder: E.g. review passports, check in or pack the backpack
tripChecklist.form.helper: Add simple preparation tasks for this trip and mark them when they are done.
tripChecklist.form.error: The task could not be saved.
tripChecklist.empty: You have not added any checklist task to this trip yet.
tripLuggage.metaDescription: Manage a private luggage list attached to each trip from a dedicated page.
tripLuggage.title: Trip luggage
tripLuggage.privateHelper: Only the trip creator can view and edit this luggage list.
tripLuggage.privateOnly: This luggage list is private and can only be viewed by the trip creator.
tripLuggage.form.title: New item
tripLuggage.form.helper: Add clothes, documents or objects you want to bring and mark them when they are ready.
tripLuggage.form.error: The item could not be saved.
tripLuggage.empty: You have not added any luggage item to this trip yet.
ai.disabled: AI features are disabled in this environment.
ai.error: The AI request could not be completed.
ai.quotaExhausted: The available AI usage limit has been reached.
ai.missingConfig: Required configuration for authenticated AI is missing.
ai.appCheckUnavailable: Firebase App Check is not ready for AI requests yet.
ai.invalidResponse: The AI response does not match the expected JSON.
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The route you are looking for does not exist or is not available in this version.
notFound.message: You can go back home or open the dashboard to keep exploring TravelPlan.
